title: [YTP] The Poop Police Persecute a Pony Pleb
description:
I don't think it's murder.

Jesus Tap-Dancing Fuck, it's been a hot minute since I've YTP'd. I'm officially retired from this nonsense, but I thought I'd do one for old times sake, for both YTP and Balloonshop, bless their souls. 

Hope I still got it.
